templates.name: Do you have employee discounts?
templates.content: Please note that you will need to speak with your HR department regarding the discounts.

templates.name: Product registration
templates.content: You can register your product here: https://www.usa.philips.com/myphilips/register-your-product

templates.name: Which shipping carriers do you use?
templates.content: Standard orders are shipped through FedEx and subscription Brush Heads and subscription OneBlade blades are shipped through UPS.

templates.name: Philips One series replacement brush head
templates.content: Any Philips One brush head works with any Philips One handle and you can check them out here - https://www.usa.philips.com/c-m-pe/toothbrush-heads/latest#availability=instock&filters=PHILIPS_ONE_SONICARE1_SU

templates.name: Where do I log in to check my Sonicare subscription?
templates.content: You can log in at the following link: https://www.usa.philips.com/c-e/pe/sonicare-subscription/home-page.html

templates.name: Sonicare for kids replacement brush heads
templates.content: Sonicare for kids has its own brush head with 2 size options (standard and compact). Check them out here: https://www.usa.philips.com/c-m-pe/toothbrush-heads/latest#availability=instock&filters=SONICARE_FOR_KIDS_T_HEADS_SU

templates.name: Which brush head fits with my handle?
templates.content: Thanks for your question! You can find which brush head matches your handle here: https://www.usa.philips.com/c-f/XC000006597/which-brush-head-fits-my-sonicare-toothbrush.

templates.name: Do you offer a one blade subscription?/ Customer asks about a free blade
templates.content: We have a blade subscription for $10 off a 2-blade subscription or $10 off a single order of 2 blades. You can check it out here: https://www.usa.philips.com/c-m-pe/oneblade-trim-edge-and-shave/myoneblade#triggername=options_2b6m-s%2Cform_sign_up

templates.name: Free brush head offer
templates.content: If you received a voucher that comes in the box with some of our handles that is an offer for a free brush head with a Sonicare brush head subscription. Please note this is only for a subscription and not a one-time purchase.

templates.name: How often should I replace my brush head?
templates.content: Great question, we recommend every 3 months!

templates.name: Questions related to Dental Professionals (Dentist offices)
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to give us a call at (800) 422-9448. One of my colleagues will be more than happy to help out!

templates.name: Questions related to Kitchen Appliances, Coffee/Espresso makers, Air purifiers/Humidifiers
templates.content: Please contact us directly at 1-833-737-1212 and one of my colleagues will be more than happy to assist you.

templates.name: Can I use your electric toothbrush with braces?
templates.content: All our Sonicare toothbrushes are suitable for use with braces. You can actually get some great tips on brushing with braces here: https://philips.attn.tv/sl/6AhCUNpQ

templates.name: Lighting, automotive, hearing, TV, and audio questions
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via this link: https://www.usa.philips.com/c-w/support-home/support-contact-page#n62Contact Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Can I use your discount in a physical/brick and mortar store?
templates.content: I'm sorry, but the discount can only be applied to an online purchase via our online store.

templates.name: Warranty Policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://www.usa.philips.com/c-w/support-home/warranty.html

templates.name: Phone Support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-866-309-3263 9am to 9pm EST, Monday to Friday or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can return your order within the first 30 days. The product must be returned clean and, in its entirety, together with its original packaging or in another solid box. You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.usa.philips.com/c-w/support-home/returns.html

templates.name: Free Shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $25. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on Twitter: https://twitter.com/PhilipsNA and FB here: http://www.facebook.com/Philips

templates.name: I'm having problems completing my order/ My payment has failed! / I can't check out
templates.content: In order to prevent payment failures, we recommend you make sure the billing address you provided matches the address your bank has for you. Also, ensure your credit/debit card is not expired and has enough available balance. Clearing your browser's cache and cookies might also help. We recommend you try your order again, preferably with a different payment method. If the issue persists, please contact your bank or card issuer.

templates.name: My order has been automatically cancelled!
templates.content: We may occasionally have to cancel an order. The most common reason for that is that the product is out of stock at the moment of shipping. Should that be the case, you'll be notified by email. We advise you to place your order again by choosing a different product or different version of the same product. It is not possible to place an order for a product that is out of stock, but any charges that may have occurred will be automatically refunded.

templates.name: I need to change the shipping/delivery address. / I used the wrong address at checkout!
templates.content: Changing the delivery address after an order has been placed isn't always possible. We advise you to wait for your Track&Trace number once the product has shipped. You may then, either contact FedEx directly or visit FedEx.com with your tracking number and check if changing the delivery address is possible. You may be asked to create an account with FedEx. Please note our support team won't be able to assist you with changing the delivery address.

templates.name: What payment methods are available?
templates.content: We accept Debit and Credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, Amex and Discover) and PayPal. All payment methods are free of charge as we don't charge any transaction fees.

templates.name: Do you ship overseas/internationally?
templates.content: We only deliver within the US including Hawaii, Alaska, and Puerto Rico. It is, unfortunately, not possible to deliver outside of the US. We can't deliver to a PO Box, BFPO address or military bases due to shipping restrictions.

templates.name: What's the difference between Power Flosser 7000 and Power Flosser 3000?
templates.content: Power Flosser 7000 has 4 flossing modes with 10 intensities, while Power Flosser 3000 only has 2 flossing modes with 10 intensities. The 7000 also has a quad stream nozzle for maximum coverage, while the 3000 has a standard nozzle for regular clean. They both have a Pulse Wave technology and discreet clean to prevent from disturbing others.

templates.name: Restock? (autosend enabled)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend signing up on the product page so you're notified the second it comes back in!

templates.name: Sponsorship/fundraising (DO NOT ESC)
templates.content: Due to the high volume, it is difficult for us to respond in a fair manner to all the requests we receive. Therefore, Philips has selected a few causes to support on a national level with the hope that the impact will be felt by people all over the country. This year, we will be supporting the United Way. We applaud your charitable spirit and wish you the best of luck with your fund-raising!

templates.name: I can't search by zip code to find a store near me!
templates.content: Really sorry! The search by zip does not work on our website and should have been removed from all pages. I'll definitely pass this on to my team!

templates.name: Do you sell coffee makers on your website?
templates.content: I'm afraid Coffee Makers are sold at retailers only.

templates.name: Are the travel cases BPA-free?
templates.content: Yes, the travel cases are free of BPA.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We deliver within the US in 2 - 5 business days for FedEx Ground shipments. If you order multiple products, your products may be shipped separately.

templates.name: Cancel/Edit Orders
templates.content: To ensure that your order is delivered as quickly as possible, we immediately process all orders automatically. As a result, it's not possible to cancel or change your order between the time of ordering and delivery. If you wish to return your order once you receive it, you can initiate your return online here https://www.usa.philips.com/shop/order-search/search-input or contact us at 1-866-309-3263 (Toll-free) between 9am-9pm EST, Monday-Friday. We'll provide a return label to send back your product for a full refund.

templates.name: My Philips Sonicare Toothbrush isn't working
templates.content: Sorry to hear that! The best way to handle this is to give us a call at 1-800-682-7664, Monday - Sunday 9:00 am - 6:00 pm EST. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Customer Support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to live chat with one of our agents via the website https://www.usa.philips.com/c-w/support-home/support-contact-page or give us a call at 1-866-309-3263 from 9 am to 9 pm EST Monday-Friday. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How to clean/care for a sonicare toothbrush?
templates.content: You can sanitize your toothbrush head daily using our UV brush head sanitizer, which removes 99% of all bacteria from your brush heads. You can also check out our detailed guide on how to clean your toothbrush here: https://philips.attn.tv/sl/ep6uykoO

templates.name: How to find the model number and slash code?
templates.content: The model number is printed on your product and consists of a 5- or 6-digit code, for example, HX9352. The slash code is not printed on the product but can be found on the purchase receipt, order confirmation, your Philips account or on the bottom of the packaging. The slash code, for example HX9352/10, distinguishes specific features and accessories of the model.

templates.name: I didn't get an invoice after completing my order
templates.content: Once available, you can download your invoice in your account. Log in to your account and click on "View your order history." Select your order number and then click on the invoice to download it.

templates.name: First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://www.usa.philips.com/c-e/healthcare-heroes.html To receive your exclusive discount you'll need to verifiy through ID Me. Please note that the voucher is valid for first purchase only (not on every subsequent order).

templates.name: My discount code isn't working
templates.content: Sorry to hear that! Can you please try placing your order in another browser or clear your browser's cache? Please note that the code is case-sensitive and make sure that there is no space before/after the code in the discount box. Let me know how that goes!

templates.name: Do I have to connect my toothbrush to the sonicare app?
templates.content: You can actually use your toothbrush without the Sonicare app. However, we advise you to connect your toothbrush with the app as much as possible as it provides personal guidance to help you improve your brushing habits.

templates.name: Do you offer repairs for the Philips Sonicare Toothbrushes?
templates.content: We do not repair Philips Sonicare Toothbrushes. If your product is still under warranty, you can check out our warranty here: https://www.usa.philips.com/c-w/support-home/warranty

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.usa.philips.com/c-e/shop/lastchance.html
